src/engine/config/ground_units_config

      • reloadGroundUnitsConfig()

Ground Units Configuration Loader

Loads ground unit stats from config/ground_units.toml using toml_serialization Allows runtime configuration for planetary defenses and invasion forces

Global configuration instanceHelper to reload configuration (for testing)

Types

ArmyConfig = object
  name*: string
  class*: string
  cst_min*: int
  build_cost*: int
  upkeep_cost*: int
  maintenance_percent*: int
  attack_strength*: int
  defense_strength*: int
  description*: string
  build_time*: int
  max_per_planet*: int
GroundBatteryConfig = object
  name*: string
  class*: string
  cst_min*: int
  build_cost*: int
  upkeep_cost*: int
  maintenance_percent*: int
  attack_strength*: int
  defense_strength*: int
  description*: string
  build_time*: int
  max_per_planet*: int
GroundUnitsConfig = object
  planetary_shield*: PlanetaryShieldConfig
  ground_battery*: GroundBatteryConfig
  army*: ArmyConfig
  marine_division*: MarineDivisionConfig
Complete ground units configuration loaded from TOML 
MarineDivisionConfig = object
  name*: string
  class*: string
  cst_min*: int
  build_cost*: int
  upkeep_cost*: int
  maintenance_percent*: int
  attack_strength*: int
  defense_strength*: int
  description*: string
  build_time*: int
  max_per_planet*: int
  requires_transport*: bool
PlanetaryShieldConfig = object
  name*: string
  class*: string
  cst_min*: int
  build_cost*: int
  upkeep_cost*: int
  attack_strength*: int
  defense_strength*: int
  description*: string
  build_time*: int
  max_per_planet*: int
  salvage_required*: bool

Vars

globalGroundUnitsConfig = loadGroundUnitsConfig("config/ground_units.toml")

Procs

proc loadGroundUnitsConfig(configPath: string = "config/ground_units.toml"): GroundUnitsConfig {.
    ...raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Load ground units configuration from TOML file Uses toml_serialization for type-safe parsing 
proc reloadGroundUnitsConfig() {....raises: [IOError, SerializationError, TomlError], tags: [
    ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Reload configuration from file
